# ons

> Provides functions to download and tidy statistical data published by the 'Office for National Statistics'. Install with `install.packages("ons")`.

Full API reference (for agents): https://raw.githubusercontent.com/charlescoverdale/ons/main/llms-full.txt

Version: 0.1.4. License: MIT.

## Functions

- [`clear_cache()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/ons/reference/clear_cache.html): Clear the local download cache
- [`ons_cpi()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/ons/reference/ons_cpi.html): Download consumer price inflation
- [`ons_employment()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/ons/reference/ons_employment.html): Download employment rate
- [`ons_gdp()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/ons/reference/ons_gdp.html): Download GDP data
- [`ons_get()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/ons/reference/ons_get.html): Download any ONS time series by CDID code
- [`ons_house_prices()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/ons/reference/ons_house_prices.html): Download UK house prices
- [`ons_inactivity()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/ons/reference/ons_inactivity.html): Download economic inactivity
- [`ons_monthly_gdp()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/ons/reference/ons_monthly_gdp.html): Download monthly GDP estimate
- [`ons_population()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/ons/reference/ons_population.html): Download population estimates
- [`ons_productivity()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/ons/reference/ons_productivity.html): Download labour productivity
- [`ons_public_finances()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/ons/reference/ons_public_finances.html): Download public sector finances
- [`ons_retail_sales()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/ons/reference/ons_retail_sales.html): Download retail sales index
- [`ons_search()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/ons/reference/ons_search.html): Search for ONS time series
- [`ons_trade()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/ons/reference/ons_trade.html): Download UK trade data
- [`ons_unemployment()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/ons/reference/ons_unemployment.html): Download unemployment rate
- [`ons_wages()`](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/ons/reference/ons_wages.html): Download average weekly earnings

## Documentation

- [Full reference](https://charlescoverdale.github.io/ons/reference/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/charlescoverdale/ons)
- [CRAN](https://CRAN.R-project.org/package=ons)
